Author: elchupi
Name: Modern XIV
Description: All-in-one plugin: dynamic camera system, race/job animation swaps, Glamourer automation, custom teleport menu, compass overlay, HP vignette, MSQ teleport, chat bubbles, and more.
Punchline: Camera dynamics, animation swaps, glamour automation, and QoL tools for FFXIV
Changelog: Style profiles with full color capture (teleport, compass, chat bubbles). Compass auto-refreshes quest markers on MSQ progression. Teleport crash guard.
